410 M1D M1D_STAGE_4_ULCER (M1D) Stage 4 Ulcers CHAR 1 Skin condition: ulcers - stage 4 in last 7 days. This field indicates the number of stage 4 ulcers on the resdient's body. Stage 4 is defined as a full thickness of skin and subcutaneous tissue is lost, exposing muscle or bone.
411 M2A M2A_PRES_ULCER (M2A) Pressure Ulcers CHAR 1 Skin condition: ulcers - pressure ulcer. This field indicates the highest stage indicator of a pressure ulcer in the last 7 days. A pressure ulcer is any
